summary: This Management Review Report evaluates the Quality Management System (QMS) for KeepMeCompany's AI-driven phone agent system. It reports strong performance in GP consultations and reduced patient waiting times, while identifying EHR integration as a future improvement area. The document outlines KPI acceptance criteria and includes management signatures dated November 2024.
